---
title: "Home"
---

# Your Name

Welcome! I’m Will Rettig, a Data Analytics major interested in sports analytics and psychology.

## What you’ll find here
- A few projects I’m proud of
- The tools I use (R, Python, SQL, Tableau/Power BI, Excel)
- Ways to contact me

::: callout-note
**Tip:** This site is built with Quarto. It’s designed to be reproducible and easy to update as your work evolves.
:::

## Quick highlights
- **Skills:** R, tidyverse, SQL, data visualization, statistical modeling  
- **Interests:** Baseball, Reading, Fishing
- **Currently seeking:** full-time positions

## Contact
- Email: rettig_w1@denison.edu or wrettig36@gmail.com  
- GitHub: https://github.com/willrettig36 
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/willrettig/
